description: Hamburg port workers union (ver.di) confirmed a 48-hour warning strike across container terminals, effective 2026-06-05 06:00 CET. Affects CTA, HHLA Burchardkai, and Eurogate terminals.
Port of Hamburg reporting elevated berth wait times of 18–24 hours for bulk carriers due to equipment maintenance on crane 7.
Port of Amsterdam imposing reduced-speed zone through inner harbour due to ongoing dredging works. Transit time increased by approximately 2 hours.
Maasvlakte II berth cluster partially closed for emergency maintenance following quay wall inspection. 3 berths affected out of 12.
